description_long: This motorcycle features a classic design with a metallic blue body, a long black cushioned seat, and chrome accents on the engine and exhaust. The front is equipped with a round headlight, two rearview mirrors mounted on high, curved handlebars, and a front fender matching the body color. The side profile reveals a sturdy frame, spoked wheels, and a rear luggage rack extending behind the seat. The engine and mechanical components are exposed, showcasing a traditional air-cooled setup. The tires are moderately thick, suitable for urban roads, and the kickstand is visible, supporting the bike upright. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian yet stylish motorcycle, ideal for city commuting.
description: A metallic blue motorcycle with a black seat, chrome engine, and high handlebars, featuring a rear luggage rack and classic round headlight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, high handlebars with mirrors, and the front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the seat, engine, exhaust, and rear luggage rack.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the seat, luggage rack, rear fender, and both mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, exhaust, and the overall frame structure.
